name: Gimme Golf - Kaysville
about: Gimme Golf - Kaysville offers a high-tech golf simulator experience with two locations in Utah. The facility provides 24/7 access to simulator bays where players can use real golf clubs, balls, and tees on world-class courses. The venue features a laid-back lounge vibe allowing guests to bring their own food and drinks, watch games, and listen to music while playing. It caters to both seasoned golfers and first-timers, offering a space to unwind, compete, or practice in an indoor environment. With booking available online and flexible membership options, it provides a convenient all-weather golfing solution.
why_golfers_like_it: Ability to bring your own food and drinks for a personalized experience
Access to over 5,000 world-class golf courses
Laid-back lounge atmosphere with sports viewing capabilities
Flexible booking options for members and walk-ins

food_and_drink.notes: BYO food policy - guests can bring their own food
BYO drinks policy - guests can bring their own beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Website mentions 'high-tech simulator bays' but doesn't specify brands or models

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs to use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a BYO (bring your own) food and drink policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing, but sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and is suitable for beginners and first-timers.
